alternate_names: American Society of Heating, Refrigerating and Air-Conditioning Engineers
notes: US-based building-systems engineering association. Publishes ASHRAE Standards including the BACnet protocol (ASHRAE 135) and increasingly building-systems cybersecurity guidance. Paid.

data.official_name: ASHRAE Standard 135 - BACnet - A Data Communication Protocol for Building Automation and Control Networks
data.notes: Paid. The dominant building-automation network protocol. Security extensions covered in BACnet/SC (Secure Connect, ASHRAE Addendum to 135).

data.official_name: ASHRAE 135 Addendum cm - BACnet Secure Connect
data.notes: Paid. TLS-based secure transport for BACnet networks.
